Trolls Band Together (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $103,974,820Details
International Box Office $106,694,583
Worldwide Box Office $210,669,403
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,591,999
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,582,124
Total $6,174,123
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After two films of true friendship and relentless flirting, Poppy and Branch are now officially, finally, a couple (#broppy)! As they grow closer, Poppy discovers that Branch has a secret past. He was once part of her favorite boyband phenomenon, BroZone, with his four brothers: Floyd, John Dory, Spruce and Clay. But when Branch’s bro Floyd is kidnapped for his musical talents by a pair of nefarious pop-star villains, Branch and Poppy embark on a harrowing and emotional journey to reunite the other brothers and rescue Floyd from a fate even worse than pop-culture obscurity.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,002,525 (28.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:49.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$95,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,870 opening theaters/3,893 max. theaters, 6.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $107,668,560

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 17th, 2023 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: October 12th, 2023 (Wide) (Denmark)
October 12th, 2023 (Wide), released as Trolls 3: Se armó la banda (Argentina)
October 13th, 2023 (Wide) (Lithuania)
October 13th, 2023 (Wide) (Estonia)
October 13th, 2023 (Wide), released as Trolls Trommer Sammen (Norway)
Video Release: December 19th, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some mild rude and suggestive humor.
(Rating bulletin 2792 (cert #54554), 7/19/2023)
Running Time: 92 minutes
Franchise: Trolls
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): California, United States
Plot point: Romance
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Toy
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Animation
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

After two films of true friendship and relentless flirting, Poppy and Branch are now officially, finally, a couple (#broppy)! As they grow closer, Poppy discovers that Branch has a secret past. He was once part of her favorite boyband phenomenon, BroZone, with his four brothers: Floyd, John Dory, Spruce and Clay. But when Branch’s bro Floyd is kidnapped for his musical talents by a pair of nefarious pop-star villains, Branch and Poppy embark on a harrowing and emotional journey to reunite the other brothers and rescue Floyd from a fate even worse than pop-culture obscurity.
